import heapq


class PriorityQueue:
    def __init__(self):
        self.items = []
        self.counter = 0

    def push(self, item, priority):
        heapq.heappush(self.items, (priority, self.counter, item))
        self.counter += 1

    def pop(self):
        priority, _, item = heapq.heappop(self.items)
        return item

    def peek(self):
        return self.items[0][2] if self.items else None


def process_tasks(tasks: list) -> list:
    pq = PriorityQueue()
    for task in tasks:
        pq.push(task, task.priority)
    results = []
    while pq.items:
        task = pq.pop()
        results.append(execute(task))
    return results
